functions.name: Mutable default argument in function
functions.description: Use None as default and initialize inside function body

recommendation.title: Avoid mutable default arguments
recommendation.description: Use None as default and initialize inside function body

functions.name: Catching overly broad exception
functions.description: Catch specific exceptions rather than broad Exception or BaseException.

recommendation.title: Catch specific exceptions
recommendation.description: Catch specific exceptions rather than broad Exception or BaseException.

functions.name: Incorrect None comparison
functions.description: Use 'is None' instead of '== None' for identity comparison.

recommendation.title: Use 'is None' for None comparison
recommendation.description: Use 'is None' instead of '== None' for identity comparison.

action.message: Using == None instead of is None

functions.name: Using type() instead of isinstance()
functions.description: Use isinstance() instead of type() to properly handle subclasses.

recommendation.title: Use isinstance() for type checking
recommendation.description: Use isinstance() instead of type() to properly handle subclasses.

functions.name: File not properly closed
functions.description: Use 'with' statement to automatically close files.

recommendation.title: Use context manager for files
recommendation.description: Use 'with' statement to automatically close files.

functions.name: Function without error handling
functions.description: Functions performing I/O should have try-except blocks.

recommendation.title: Add error handling to functions
recommendation.description: Functions performing I/O should have try-except blocks.

functions.name: Using eval() or exec()
functions.description: Use ast.literal_eval for safe evaluation or redesign to avoid code execution.

recommendation.title: Avoid eval() and exec()
recommendation.description: Use ast.literal_eval for safe evaluation or redesign to avoid code execution.

action.message: Using eval() or exec() is a security risk

functions.name: Using pickle with untrusted data
functions.description: Use JSON for data serialization. If pickle is required, validate source.

recommendation.title: Use JSON instead of pickle
recommendation.description: Use JSON for data serialization. If pickle is required, validate source.

action.message: Using pickle to load untrusted data is a security risk

functions.name: Hardcoded secret or password
functions.description: Store secrets in environment variables or a secrets manager.

recommendation.title: Use environment variables for secrets
recommendation.description: Store secrets in environment variables or a secrets manager.

functions.name: String concatenation in loop
functions.description: Use ''.join(list) instead of + in loops for better performance.

recommendation.title: Use str.join() for string concatenation
recommendation.description: Use ''.join(list) instead of + in loops for better performance.

action.message: String concatenation in loop is inefficient

functions.name: Ignored exception variable
functions.description: Either use the exception variable or use 'except:' without 'as'.

recommendation.title: Use exception variable or omit 'as' clause
recommendation.description: Either use the exception variable or use 'except:' without 'as'.

action.message: Exception variable captured but not used

functions.name: Using time.sleep() in async code
functions.description: Use asyncio.sleep() instead of time.sleep() to avoid blocking the event loop.

recommendation.title: Use asyncio.sleep() in async code
recommendation.description: Use asyncio.sleep() instead of time.sleep() to avoid blocking the event loop.

action.message: Using blocking time.sleep() in async function

functions.name: Potential SQL injection
functions.description: Use %s or %(name)s placeholders with parameters, not f-strings.

recommendation.title: Use parameterized queries
recommendation.description: Use %s or %(name)s placeholders with parameters, not f-strings.

functions.name: Bare raise in except block
functions.description: Use 'raise ... from ...' or ensure raise is inside an except block.

recommendation.title: Use raise from or proper exception handling
recommendation.description: Use 'raise ... from ...' or ensure raise is inside an except block.

action.message: Bare raise statement outside except handler

functions.name: Missing type hints on function parameters
functions.description: Add type hints like def foo(x: int) -> str:

recommendation.title: Add type hints to function parameters
recommendation.description: Add type hints like def foo(x: int) -> str:

functions.name: Using Any type
functions.description: Replace Any with specific types or use generics.

recommendation.title: Use specific types instead of Any
recommendation.description: Replace Any with specific types or use generics.

action.message: Using Any type reduces type safety

functions.name: Modifying global variable
functions.description: Pass variables as parameters or use a class/config.

recommendation.title: Avoid global variables
recommendation.description: Pass variables as parameters or use a class/config.
